name_en: Coach factory channel goods new arrival CV933 Oulet women's bag patchwork TERI shoulder bag. DETAILS: Material: Cowhide, 2 card slots, built-in multi-functional pocket, top zipper closure, fabric lining, vertical length 21cm, detachable handle vertical length 58cm, detachable shoulder strap, can be worn on shoulder or crossbody, 24.5cm(L)×15.5cm(H)×7.5cm(W)
